title: Read and update Google Sheets through connected Workspace
triggerExamples: liệt kê Google Sheet gần đây
tokenSource: Telegram CEO web_fetch automatically attaches internal bearer auth for localhost API; no model-visible token

apiCalls.purpose: prove Sheets and Drive APIs are enabled
list recent Google Sheets through Drive
read real tab names before choosing a range

successProofs: write response contains Google API update metadata
negativeTests: must not fetch docs.google.com directly when Workspace is connected
must not ask CEO to make a Sheet public before trying local API
must not use ad-hoc Drive query type:spreadsheet for recent Sheets
